source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Calm culinary English UI with restrained hierarchy, readable numerals, and Japanese typography guidance.
layout: Quiet product grids, olive-leaf separators, matte texture, 8px radii, measured navigation, and savory status accents.

prompts.label: Transparent olive branch motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Olive transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only an olive branch motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as a single complete subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A Mediterranean olive branch with small oval olive-green fruits, silver-green narrow leaves, warm bark-brown twig, matte fruit skin, subtle pressed-oil highlights, and calm grove character. Botanical accuracy, crisp subject edges, unmistakably olive.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include branch, leaves, and clustered olives without cropping. Clean studio lighting, no cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no grapes, no eucalyptus, no laurel, no olive oil bottle, no bowl, no hand, no props, no landscape, no text, no watermark, no second plant species.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Olive light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Olive", derived from the visible olive branch cutout. This board is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible calm culinary UI theme.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Olive, Olive Branch, Palette, Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Extract the palette and interaction language from olive-green fruit, silver leaf surfaces, bark-brown twigs, pressed-oil gold highlights, stone pith neutrals, and Mediterranean grove calm. The board must read as olive, not grape or eucalyptus.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Style: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, precise grid, 8px card radius, olive-cream product surfaces, olive-green primary actions, pressed-oil accents, silver-leaf secondary states, grove-green success, bark-brown dividers, matte leaf and fruit texture.
Constraints: no grapes, no eucalyptus, no wine imagery, no oil bottle branding, no generic green monochrome UI, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Olive", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Olive dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Olive". It must feel like the visible light-mode board translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the olive branch cutout.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Olive, Olive Branch, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Preserve olive system language: olive-green active states, silver leaf accents, pressed-oil highlights, bark-brown borders, stone-pith text, matte grove texture, 8px radius, precise shadcn/tweakcn component grid. Must read as olive, not grape or eucalyptus.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Visual details: deep grove ink and bark-brown dark surfaces, stone-pith foreground, olive-green active states, pressed-oil chart highlights, silver leaf muted panels, subtle matte leaf overlays, crisp cards and controls.
Constraints: no grapes, no eucalyptus, no wine imagery, no neon colors, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no pure-black-only flat background, no illegible tiny paragraphs, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Olive".
